verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` to confirm no compilation errors. Manually verify the bulk delete UI in the Task panel.
environment_constraints: No test framework. Verification is via successful build.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns in PinPanel.jsx for bulk delete UI. Use lucide-react icons. Use Tailwind CSS for styling.
key_patterns: Bulk delete in PinPanel.jsx uses: deleteMode state (boolean), selectedForDelete state (Set of IDs), showDeleteConfirm state (boolean), select all / deselect all, confirmation modal. The FullTaskManager component receives onDeleteTask prop but deleting tasks through it removes linked pins. For bulk delete, we need a new prop (onBulkDeleteTasks) that converts linked pins to standalone instead of deleting them.
directory_structure: src/ contains all components. App.jsx is the root with all state management. FullTaskManager.jsx is the Task panel component. PinPanel.jsx has the reference bulk delete pattern.
